summary: Phase A login/auth UX — both backend AND frontend tested live. Backend: 11/11 pytests pass (check-account: existing+unknown+invalid+blank; forgot-password: email-link, phone-otp, operator-403, anti-enumeration; reset-password: short-pw rejected, success + login, one-shot enforcement, invalid token). Frontend live on /login: WelcomeView renders new UI, Terms+Privacy links correctly target=_blank with rel=noopener+noreferrer, two-step login works (bad email → red error alert + signup CTA; good email → step2 with echo+edit+forgot link), Edit button returns to step1 with identifier prefilled and password hidden, ForgotPassword modal opens with all sub-elements. TWO BUGS FOUND.

ui_bugs.issue: welcome-home-link is missing target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer" — spec explicitly requires "open in a new tab". Terms/Privacy links have it; Homepage link does not (live attributes confirm target=None rel=None).

forgot-sandbox-link is gated on `info?.reset_link && info?.dispatched === false`, but in this preview env the backend returns dispatched=true (Resend reports success in sandbox), so the dev fallback link NEVER renders despite reset_link being present in the API response. Spec requires the sandbox link to be surfaced for dev/QA. Suggest dropping the `info?.dispatched === false` guard and showing the link whenever `info?.reset_link` is present (or conditionally on NODE_ENV/APP_PUBLIC_URL containing 'preview').

action_items: Add target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" to welcome-home-link in WelcomeView.jsx so the Return-to-Homepage link opens in a new tab (matches Terms/Privacy behavior).

Relax the sandbox-link visibility guard in ForgotPasswordView.jsx (line 174): show forgot-sandbox-link whenever info?.reset_link exists (the backend only includes reset_link as a dev fallback anyway). Otherwise QA cannot complete the email-reset flow in preview.
critical_code_review_comments: ForgotPasswordView.jsx visibility logic for forgot-sandbox-link is too strict — couples UI to a backend signal (dispatched=false) that doesn't fire when Resend reports success even in sandbox. Render whenever reset_link is present.
Backend /api/auth/forgot-password could honor an APP_ENV/preview env flag to deterministically force `dispatched=false` in non-prod, eliminating the coupling above.
/api/auth/check-account intentionally returns role+status on existence — that's a small enumeration trade-off, acceptable given rate-limiting, but worth a comment in the doc-string (already present).
Forgot-password endpoint returns the OTP in clear text in the JSON response when SMS_DISPATCH_ENABLED!=true — make sure SMS_DISPATCH_ENABLED is set to 'true' in production deployment.

success_rate.frontend: 9/11 live-verified flows (welcome/terms/privacy links, login 2-step, error+CTA, edit-back, forgot modal); 2 spec deviations (home-link target, sandbox-link gating)

test_credentials: Using /app/memory/test_credentials.md — customer@test.com / testpassword123 (rotated through reset, restored to testpassword123); mani-monroe@netflix.com used for operator-block 403 assertion.
seed_data_creation: None. Reset-password test restores the customer's password to testpassword123 so other suites still pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A: New /api/auth/check-account, /api/auth/forgot-password, /api/auth/reset-password are all working at the API layer. UI flows pass end-to-end live except (1) welcome-home-link missing target=_blank, (2) forgot-sandbox-link hidden because info.dispatched===true. Reset-password page (/reset-password?token=...) and Phone-OTP UI stage were NOT live-tested end-to-end because the sandbox link wasn't surfaced; pytest covers the backend reset flow. Cloudflare bot challenge intermittently returns a blank page — retry once or twice if welcome-home-link selector misses on first hit.
rca of the issue: Bug 1 (welcome-home-link new-tab): When WelcomeView.jsx was refactored to use MARKETING_LINKS.HOME, the Terms/Privacy anchors were updated with target+rel attrs but the Homepage anchor was overlooked. Fix: add target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" on the <a> at WelcomeView.jsx:55-61. Bug 2 (sandbox-link never renders): ForgotPasswordView.jsx:174 guard `info?.reset_link && info?.dispatched === false` assumes Resend will FAIL in sandbox; in this preview the Resend client returns success so backend sets dispatched=true while still including reset_link as a fallback. Fix: drop the `info?.dispatched === false` part of the guard — render the sandbox-link whenever info?.reset_link is present (backend only adds it as a dev fallback already).
